// NOTE: this file is used to disable tests in our test suite by their full title.
node feature handles Promise timeouts correctly
node feature NODE_OPTIONS Disallows crypto-related options
node feature NODE_OPTIONS does not allow --require in packaged apps
node feature Node.js cli flags Prohibits crypto-related flags in LYNXTRON_RUN_AS_NODE mode
node feature inspector Supports starting the v8 inspector with --inspect and a provided port
